name: Bill Burr
blurb: The everyman rant; talks hostile crowds into love.
bio: Bill Burr is the everyman ranter who can talk a hostile crowd into loving him, escalating from petty grievance to societal indictment without ever losing the room. Paper Tiger and his Philadelphia meltdown are modern landmarks.
accolades: Multiple Grammy nominations for comedy albums
Created the animated series F Is for Family
One of the top touring headliners in comedy

specials.t: You People Are All the Same
Im Sorry You Feel That Way
